feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Entering Trading Partner in Park supplier invoice App
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are performing park supplier invoice, and wanted to enter trading partner field. However, seems like it is not possible to enter this field like in GUI with Tcode FV60. Is there a way in public cloud to be able to enter trading partner while parking supplier invoice? Thanks!

entry.title: Free Form Payments Process in SAP
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We would like to understand about Free Form Payment Process in SAP. The Help.SAP portal offers product assistance in two aspects one is SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and other in Financial Operations.

Below are few questions regarding this topic
1. Free Form Payment are only used for Swiss QR-Bills and only CHF or EUR currencies are supported? ( Note - We are working in Public Cloud)
2. Is this model suitable only for one time customers/vendors?
3. How is it different to Automatic Payment Program?

We would really appreciate if the community can throw some light on this concept.

Regards,
Abha Hardikar

entry.title: how to trigger staple functionality in local printer with output from sap public cloud system
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have requirement to trigger the staple functionality from sap public cloud system. I have checked in sap note and print queue settings but there is no option related to staple.

Please advise if its possible

entry.title: Change credit limit currency.
entry.content:
Credit limit currency is not as per the customer currency and not editable.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Restricted Access to Pricing Configuration Elements in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
I am a Junior Consultant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, specializing in the Sales and Distribution module. I am still becoming familiar with the system, and I am currently reviewing the topic of sales pricing configuration. When I try to access the app Implementation Activities -> General Business Data -> Price Management -> Sales Pricing -> Setting for Pricing in Sales, I only see a few configuration options available, and they do not include the basic settings needed for condition configuration, such as condition tables, pricing procedures, or access sequences.

When I try to check these configurations through CBC, I am redirected to an error page.
I have confirmed with my facilitator that I have the necessary access rights.
Do you know what might be causing this issue?

entry.title: Global Currency amount is 0, how to correct it?
entry.content:
The global currency amount in JE should be the same as company code currency amount. How can I correct it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CDS View for Equipment Partner Functions, A_EquipmentPartner
entry.content:
Hi everone,

I am looking for a CDS View containing Equipment / Technical Object Partner information, like A_EquipmentPartner or displayed in https://myxxx.s4hana.cloud.sap/ui#MaintenanceObject-display?sap-ui-tech-hint=WDA

This crutial to report equipments by customer and thus sales representative etc.

Thank you and best regards
Tim

entry.title: Scope item 1GA "in deprecation" - will it be replaced and should it still be used in activation?
entry.content:
Hi, 

We're activating a new S/4 Public Cloud system and intend to activate 1GA, however we noticed it is "in deprecation". I haven't been able to find further information about this, will it be replaced? Should it still be used in activation of a system? 

Thanks in advance, 

Tina

entry.title: Is it possible to restrict Bill of Materials using Authorization Group at Alternative Level ?
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Cloud the Restriction 'Authorization Group for BOM Usage'  is available as outlined in the KBA 3217088 but when it is maintained for one alternative in a Multiple BOM , it applied to all alternatives

We need to restrict the Usage by Alternative BOM.

Can you please confirm whether this is Possible in Public Cloud, as we see the Authorization Group in Bom Header but its not working as expected?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Journal Entry API XML example with item with 0% VAT tax
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to send a JE XML document via SAP S/4 Public Cloud API, containing an item with 0% VAT tax value.

Currently I can send JE XML documents with success via API JOURNALENTRYCREATEREQUESTCONFI with the following main XML structure:

<soapenv:Envelope ...>
  <soapenv:Body>
    <sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>
      <JournalEntryCreateRequest>
        <JournalEntry>
          <Item>...</Item>
          <Item>...</Item>
          ...
        <JournalEntry>

Now I need to send JE entries with 0% VAT values on specific CoA accounts that have mandatory VAT data.

After analysis I found that I need to add a <Tax> tag inside the <Item> tag, and in the end of <Item> tag list, some <DebtorItem> or <ProductTaxItem> tags, like I found in this example:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/payload-examples-for-api-journal-entry-post/ba-p/13392342 
 
However I always get errors when sending JE via POSTMAN (Tax statement item missing for tax code XXX, etc) and can't find any practical example with 0% VAT tax value.
 
Does anybody know what is the correct XML structure to send a JE document with 0% VAT value via API?
Thanks

entry.title: Audit report for Import Collection app
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

We are about to be audited and one of the data requests received is the changes in 'Import Collection'. Are we able to get a report on this data?

 

Thank you. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Purchase Order Receipt in different plant then the one ordering goods
entry.content:
Our client would like to create purchase order from a Plant (e.g. Plant A) but good receipt should happen in a different Plant (e.g. Plant B, which is more like a warehouse). Since is not possible to change plant at good receipt level, the best option would be to insert in Purchase Order Plant B directly, this could cause inconsistency in good receipt related to cost object, since cost of the purchasing would be recorded in Plant B and not Plant A.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Opening periods in SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Good morning!

Please your help.

I want to register a supplier invoice in january and february months of this current year 2025 but I get the next error:

What can I do?

#SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition

#Supplier Invoice

SAP S/4HANA Finance 

#SAP S/4 HANA Logistic

entry.title: Different Profit Center derivation than the Cost Center master data (Message KI339)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and facing an issue related to the assignment of the profit center (CEBE) in manual journal entries.

When I try to post a journal entry and manually enter a profit center different from the one assigned to the cost center in its master data, the system overwrites my value and displays message KI339: “Profit center was set to &1”.

🔍Context and what I've checked

I came across this thread in the SAP Community, where someone mentioned that SSCUI 103007 can be used to change the behavior of this message.

However, I don’t see this SSCUI available in my Central Business Configuration (CBC).

❓My questions are:

  1. Has SSCUI 103007 been changed or replaced?  Because I have checked the accelerator "SSCUI_List_EN_XX" and this SSCUI is not in this excel, so now it´s not available. I remember I have done message control on this SSCUI in the past at least for the area M8, and this area now is in other SSCUI. Is it possible the area KI is now in a different SSCUI?

  2. If I switch off the message KI339 (set it to “Switch off message”), will the system allow me to retain the manually entered profit center, even if it differs from the cost center’s master data?

  3. I also checked the standard substitution rule /0SAP/SetProfitCenter in the "Manage Substitution and Validation Rules" app, but:

    • I cannot modify the standard rule.

    • When I try to create a new substitution for the same business context (FINS_ACC_MS_1), I don’t see how I could prevent the profit center from being overwritten if it's already manually entered.

🙏I’d really appreciate your help

If anyone has experienced a similar issue or knows of a workaround (via configuration or logic), I'd be very grateful for your insights.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Customisation on S4 HANA Public Cloud System
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a custom OData Service developed on S4 HANA Server(on-premise), Can we move custom Odata service to S/4 Hana Public cloud system. ? If not then is there is a way to create custom odata service on Public Cloud?

Regards

PM

entry.title: Deactivate EWM for SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP team,

Our client is thinking of deactivating EWM for their SAP Public cloud system but we are not able to find any guidelines regarding this. Would you be able to help with the action items if we proceed with this deactivation? Will it be easily done through configuration or do we need SAP help? Thank you.

entry.title: Log in as another CB user
entry.content:
Hi Expert !

I would like to confirm how to log in as a CB user.

My CB user is CB9980000043 and I log in with this ID.

I created a user in the App "Manage Workforce".
I would like to log in using the additional user I created. Is there any way to do this?

Soma

entry.title: Unable to debug Adobe Javascript code in Adobe LiveCycle Designer
entry.content:
Hi All

 

We are facing an issue with Adobe LiveCycle Designer( Remote desktop). It appears that the software does not provide a built-in JavaScript debugger, which makes it challenging to debug code efficiently. We have done the debugger settings in  Acrobat Reader, however we don’t have Acrobat Professional in our system( Remote desktop).

Could you please let  us know if we have to install  Acrobat Professional  to resolve this issue or any other suggestions is really appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,

Rajeswari

entry.title: sap transports tracking in 2sl system
entry.content:
Hello team,

 

I would like to know is there any possibility to tracking of transports in 2sl system for public cloud as it is causing so many disruptions between people who is having access for it .

 

kindly let us know the possibilities to track changes  before transporting it

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - Maintain multiple delivery address in Purchase Order
entry.content:
In S/4HANA ME21N Create Purchase Order, field Address No. under tab Delivery Address. User will select multiple address using this field to change address.

However, we cannot found where to maintain the address no. in Public Cloud "Create Purchase Order Advanced App". We checked the case below, it mentioned using BADI to maintain the multiple address.
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/maintain-delivery-address/qaq-p/12670173

 

Could you please confirm if any app can maintain the address no. or need to use BADI to maintain it? Thank you!
